items.title: Iran war unlikely to trigger terror attacks in Indonesia: ex-militants
At least 15 killed in southern Lebanon
items.description: The US embassy in Beirut said Lebanon is at a critical crossroads and called for a meeting between Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, despite a fragile situation that many Lebanese would find hard to describe as a true ceasefire. On Thursday, Israeli strikes reportedly killed …

items.title: What do Ukraine’s robot soldiers mean for the future of warfare?
items.description: Remote-controlled weapons have been used for some time, but AI is now on the cusp of making battlefield decisions.

items.title: Zelenskyy says he's seeking details of Putin's May 9 ceasefire proposal
items.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is seeking details of a short-term ceasefire Russia proposed to U.S. President Donald Trump.

items.title: London assailant charged with attempted murder over terror stabbing of 2 Jews
items.description: Israel deployed laser system in UAE to help intercept Iranian missiles and drones — report * Ahead of war powers deadline, US official says hostilities with Iran ‘terminated’ amid ceasefire The post London assailant charged with attempted murder over terror stabbing of 2 Jews appeared first on The Times of Israel.

items.title: Kremlin Says Ukraine’s Consent Not Needed for Ceasefire as Zelensky Rejects ‘Theatre’
items.description: Zelensky called Moscow’s proposed Victory Day truce “manipulative” theater, while the Kremlin said the ceasefire will proceed regardless of Kyiv’s response.

items.title: Is our home safe? Is it rubble? For displaced Lebanese, anguished uncertainty.
items.description: Lebanese people displaced by war have been on an emotional roller coaster. A ceasefire has been extended, but fighting in the south hasn’t ended. Even as families yearning for home prepare to return, despite the uncertainty, they are warned not to take the risk.

items.title: Hegseth, richiesta autorizzazione per Iran? Tregua sospende i 60 giorni
items.description: La scadenza domani, per legge la Casa Bianca dovrebbe rivolgersi al Congresso

items.title: Oil price tops $126 a barrel after Trump warns Iran blockade could last ‘months’
items.description: Markets spooked as US president appears willing to keep up naval blockade and Iran keeps strait of Hormuz all but shutBusiness live – latest updatesThe global oil price hit $126 a barrel on Thursday, its highest level since 2022, after Donald Trump said the US blockade of Iranian ports could last for months and peace t…

items.title: Malian jihadists seek to blockade capital
items.description: JNIM, an Al Qaeda-affiliated terrorist group, has declared a blockade of Bamako after launching an offensive against country's ruling junta on Saturday. France has urged its citizens to temporarily leave the country.

items.title: Ukraine Strikes Deep Inside Russia, Tuapse Hit Again
items.description: Ukraine has hit an oil facility and industrial site in Russia's Perm region, roughly 1,500 kilometers from the Ukrainian border, according to Russian officials, as US President Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin discussed a potential temporary cease-fire aimed at pausing the four-year war in Ukraine.

items.title: Three takeaways from Hegseth's clash with lawmakers over Iran war
items.description: The hours-long hearing was the first time the US defence secretary had faced questions under oath since the conflict began.

items.title: Putin, Trump Discuss Iran, Ukraine in Phone Call, Kremlin Aide Says
items.description: Putin offered a ceasefire in the fighting in Ukraine on May 9, when Russia celebrates the Soviet Union's World War II victory over Nazi Germany.

items.title: SECURITY COUNCIL LIVE: Gaza ceasefire is ‘increasingly fragile’, UN warns
items.description: The Security Council turns again to the Middle East crisis in New York on Tuesday, with debate focusing on the fragile Gaza ceasefire, a worsening humanitarian crisis there and efforts to advance a US-backed peace plan.UN senior political affairs official Khaled Khiari warned of increasingly dire conditions in Gaza and…
